# sample-cms

Full sample ConfigMaps round-trip (CM->CR->CM); documents known YAML/lossy re-emissions

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/roundtrip/sample-cms` |
| CR name | `argocd-config` |
| Namespace | `argocd` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: argocd
data:
  url: https://argocd.example.com
  oidc.config: |
    name: Example
    issuer: https://issuer.example.com
    clientID: argocd
    clientSecret: $oidc.clientSecret
    requestedScopes:
      - openid
      - profile
      - email
      - groups
  dex.config: |
    connectors:
      - type: github
        id: github
        name: GitHub
        config:
          clientID: $dex.github.clientId
          clientSecret: $dex.github.clientSecret
          orgs:
            - name: example-org
  resource.exclusions: |
    - apiGroups:
        - "*"
      kinds:
        - ProviderConfigUsage
  resource.compareoptions: |
    ignoreResourceStatusField: all
    ignoreDifferencesOnResourceUpdates: true
  resource.customizations.health.cert-manager.io_Certificate: |
    hs = {}
    hs.status = "Healthy"
    return hs
  resource.customizations.actions.apps_Deployment: |
    discovery.lua: |
      actions = {}
      actions["restart"] = {}
      return actions
    definitions:
      - name: restart
        action.lua: |
          return obj
  application.resourceTrackingMethod: annotation
  application.sync.impersonation.enabled: "true"
  cluster.inClusterEnabled: "true"
  passwordPattern: "^.{8,32}$"
  timeout.reconciliation: 180s
  timeout.reconciliation.jitter: 60s
  installationID: "sample-install"
  jsonnet.enable: "true"
  server.rbac.disableApplicationFineGrainedRBACInheritance: "false"
  users.anonymous.enabled: "false"
  ui.bannercontent: Welcome
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: argocd
data:
  application.namespaces: "team-*,sandbox"
  repo.server: argocd-repo-server:8081
  redis.server: argocd-redis:6379
  redis.compression: gzip
  server.insecure: "false"
  controller.sharding.algorithm: legacy
  controller.status.processors: "20"
  controller.operation.processors: "10"
  controller.self.heal.timeout.seconds: "5"
  controller.sync.wave.delay.seconds: "2"
  hydrator.enabled: "false"
  reposerver.plugin.tar.exclusions: "*.git;*.tmp"
  reposerver.parallelism.limit: "10"
  server.basehref: /argo-cd
  server.rootpath: /argo-cd
  server.disable.auth: "false"
  server.enable.gzip: "true"
  server.webhook.parallelism.limit: "5"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.progressive.syncs: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.policy: sync
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.client.qps: "50"
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.client.burst: "100"
  applicationsetcontroller.repo.server.ca.cert.path: /etc/argocd/appsset/ca.crt
  applicationsetcontroller.repo.server.client.cert.path: /etc/argocd/appsset/tls.crt
  applicationsetcontroller.repo.server.client.cert.key.path: /etc/argocd/appsset/tls.key
  controller.profile.enabled: "false"
  dexserver.disable.tls: "true"
  notificationscontroller.processors.count: "5"
  notificationscontroller.repo.server.ca.cert.path: /etc/argocd/notifications/ca.crt
  notificationscontroller.repo.server.client.cert.path: /etc/argocd/notifications/tls.crt
  notificationscontroller.repo.server.client.cert.key.path: /etc/argocd/notifications/tls.key
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: argocd
data:
  policy.default: role:readonly
  policy.matchMode: glob
  scopes: '[groups]'
  policy.csv: |
    p, role:org-admin, applications, *, */*, allow
    p, role:org-admin, clusters, get, *, allow
    g, my-github-org:my-team, role:org-admin
  policy.extra.csv: |
    p, role:extra, applications, get, */*, allow
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  applicationNamespaceGlobs:
  - team-*
  - sandbox
  applicationSet:
    k8sClient:
      burst: 100
      qps: "50"
    policy: sync
    progressiveSyncs:
      enabled: true
    repoServerClient:
      caCertPath: /etc/argocd/appsset/ca.crt
      clientCertKeyPath: /etc/argocd/appsset/tls.key
      clientCertPath: /etc/argocd/appsset/tls.crt
  cluster:
    inClusterEnabled: true
  commitServer: {}
  controller:
    diff:
      compareOptions:
        ignoreDifferencesOnResourceUpdates: true
        ignoreResourceStatusField: all
    processors:
      operation: 10
      status: 20
    profileEnabled: false
    reconciliation:
      jitter: 1m0s
      timeout: 3m0s
    resource:
      actions:
      - definitions:
        - actionLua: |
            return obj
          name: restart
        discoveryLua: |
          actions = {}
          actions["restart"] = {}
          return actions
        group: apps
        kind: Deployment
      exclusions:
      - apiGroups:
        - '*'
        kinds:
        - ProviderConfigUsage
      health:
      - group: cert-manager.io
        healthLua: |
          hs = {}
          hs.status = "Healthy"
          return hs
        kind: Certificate
    resourceTrackingMethod: annotation
    selfHeal:
      timeout: 5s
    sharding:
      algorithm: legacy
    sourceHydrator:
      enabled: false
    sync:
      impersonation:
        mode: required
      wave:
        delay: 2s
  dexServer:
    tlsEnabled: false
  installationID: sample-install
  notifications:
    processorsCount: 5
    repoServerClient:
      caCertPath: /etc/argocd/notifications/ca.crt
      clientCertKeyPath: /etc/argocd/notifications/tls.key
      clientCertPath: /etc/argocd/notifications/tls.crt
  redis:
    compression: gzip
    server: argocd-redis:6379
  repoServer:
    address: argocd-repo-server:8081
    jsonnet:
      enabled: true
    parallelismLimit: 10
    plugin:
      tarExclusionGlobs:
      - '*.git'
      - '*.tmp'
  server:
    authEnabled: true
    baseHref: /argo-cd
    compression: gzip
    dex:
      connectors:
      - config:
          clientID: $dex.github.clientId
          clientSecret: $dex.github.clientSecret
          orgs:
          - name: example-org
        id: github
        name: GitHub
        type: github
    oidc:
      clientID: argocd
      clientSecretRef:
        key: oidc.clientSecret
        name: argocd-secret
      issuerURL: https://issuer.example.com
      name: Example
      requestedScopes:
      - openid
      - profile
      - email
      - groups
    rbac:
      applicationFineGrainedInheritanceEnabled: true
      default: role:readonly
      matchMode: glob
      policyCSV: |
        p, role:org-admin, applications, *, */*, allow
        p, role:org-admin, clusters, get, *, allow
        g, my-github-org:my-team, role:org-admin
      policyOverlays:
      - csv: |
          p, role:extra, applications, get, */*, allow
        name: extra
      scopes:
      - groups
    rootPath: /argo-cd
    tlsEnabled: true
    ui:
      banner:
        content: Welcome
    urls:
    - https://argocd.example.com
    users:
      anonymousEnabled: false
      passwordRegex: ^.{8,32}$
    webhook:
      parallelismLimit: 5
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  application.resourceTrackingMethod: annotation
  application.sync.impersonation.enabled: "true"
  application.sync.impersonation.enforced: "true"
  cluster.inClusterEnabled: "true"
  dex.config: |
    connectors:
    - config:
        clientID: $dex.github.clientId
        clientSecret: $dex.github.clientSecret
        orgs:
        - name: example-org
      id: github
      name: GitHub
      type: github
  installationID: sample-install
  jsonnet.enable: "true"
  oidc.config: |
    clientID: argocd
    clientSecret: $oidc.clientSecret
    issuer: https://issuer.example.com
    name: Example
    requestedScopes:
    - openid
    - profile
    - email
    - groups
  passwordPattern: ^.{8,32}$
  resource.compareoptions: |
    ignoreDifferencesOnResourceUpdates: true
    ignoreResourceStatusField: all
  resource.customizations.actions.apps_Deployment: |
    definitions:
    - action.lua: |
        return obj
      name: restart
    discovery.lua: |
      actions = {}
      actions["restart"] = {}
      return actions
  resource.customizations.health.cert-manager.io_Certificate: |
    hs = {}
    hs.status = "Healthy"
    return hs
  resource.exclusions: |
    - apiGroups:
      - '*'
      kinds:
      - ProviderConfigUsage
  server.rbac.disableApplicationFineGrainedRBACInheritance: "false"
  timeout.reconciliation: 3m0s
  timeout.reconciliation.jitter: 1m0s
  ui.bannercontent: Welcome
  url: https://argocd.example.com
  users.anonymous.enabled: "false"
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: argocd
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  application.namespaces: team-*,sandbox
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.progressive.syncs: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.client.burst: "100"
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.client.qps: "50"
  applicationsetcontroller.policy: sync
  applicationsetcontroller.repo.server.ca.cert.path: /etc/argocd/appsset/ca.crt
  applicationsetcontroller.repo.server.client.cert.key.path: /etc/argocd/appsset/tls.key
  applicationsetcontroller.repo.server.client.cert.path: /etc/argocd/appsset/tls.crt
  controller.operation.processors: "10"
  controller.profile.enabled: "false"
  controller.self.heal.timeout.seconds: "5"
  controller.sharding.algorithm: legacy
  controller.status.processors: "20"
  controller.sync.wave.delay.seconds: "2"
  dexserver.disable.tls: "true"
  hydrator.enabled: "false"
  notificationscontroller.processors.count: "5"
  notificationscontroller.repo.server.ca.cert.path: /etc/argocd/notifications/ca.crt
  notificationscontroller.repo.server.client.cert.key.path: /etc/argocd/notifications/tls.key
  notificationscontroller.repo.server.client.cert.path: /etc/argocd/notifications/tls.crt
  redis.compression: gzip
  redis.server: argocd-redis:6379
  repo.server: argocd-repo-server:8081
  reposerver.parallelism.limit: "10"
  reposerver.plugin.tar.exclusions: '*.git;*.tmp'
  server.basehref: /argo-cd
  server.disable.auth: "false"
  server.enable.gzip: "true"
  server.insecure: "false"
  server.rootpath: /argo-cd
  server.webhook.parallelism.limit: "5"
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: argocd
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  policy.csv: |
    p, role:org-admin, applications, *, */*, allow
    p, role:org-admin, clusters, get, *, allow
    g, my-github-org:my-team, role:org-admin
  policy.default: role:readonly
  policy.extra.csv: |
    p, role:extra, applications, get, */*, allow
  policy.matchMode: glob
  scopes: '- groups'
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: argocd
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```
